content: {"file": "src/core/linker/environment.js", "summary": "This file contains the core logic for Angular's environment injector and application initialization. It includes functions to create an application, manage change detection scheduling, and handle image performance warnings.", "rules": [{"name": "ChangeDetectionScheduler", "description": "Manages when change detection should run in the Angular framework.", "conditions": ["notify method called with type 0"], "actions": ["Set shouldRefreshViews flag to true"]}, {"name": "ImagePerformanceWarning", "description": "Logs warnings for oversized images and LCP elements that are lazy loaded, which can negatively impact performance.", "conditions": ["scanImages method runs on window load or after a delay"], "actions": ["Log warnings if conditions for oversized images or incorrect lazy loading of LCP element are met"]}], "dependencies": ["NgZone", "ErrorHandling", "ChangeDetectionScheduler", "ImagePerformanceWarning"]}
